location.label: T[i]' == 0.1*hour*( (T[i+1] - T[i])*U_partition*A / mc_room + (T[i-1] - T[i])*U_partition*A / mc_room + (T_ambient - T[i])*U_exterior*A / mc_room + (T_ambient - T[i])*U_exterior*A / mc_room + P[i] / mc_room )

template.name: EndRoom
template.parameter: const int i, const int j

location.label: T[i]' == minute*( (T[j] - T[i])*U_partition*A / mc_room + (T_ambient - T[i])*U_exterior*A / mc_room + (T_ambient - T[i])*U_exterior*A / mc_room + (T_ambient - T[i])*U_exterior*A / mc_room + P[i] / mc_room )

query.formula: strategy chill = minE(sum (i:int[0,3]) (fabs(T[i] - 19))) [<=600] {} -> {T[0], T[1], T[2], T[3]} : <> time >= 600
simulate[<=600;1] {T[0], T[1], T[2], T[3]} under chill
simulate[<=600;1] {T[0], T[1], T[2], T[3]} under NE
